title: Garfield
description:
Adds Garfield to the game, and some Garfield themed stuff

Original Garfield (Pictured in images) and current model made/inspired by FishStacks on twitter
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73d77fdad16ef123e88be147f2e9f37a92420a97.png)

This mod plans too adds the lovable orange tabby Garfield!


- Garfield
    has a 10% chance of spawning when a lasagna is placed, do NOT let him die. Garfield is peacful and will follow you if your holding lasagna

- Lasagna
    Can be crafted and eaten like cake, the lasagna has 9 slices and gives 5 hunger points each
  
- **DO NOT LET GARFIELD DIE**
    if he does, he will turn into a large, vingful monster who is very strong and extremly quick.

- if you _do_ slay the monstrous Garfield, you will be given the stuffed bear pookie and a special advancment.
